sourceTitle: Webometrics.org Global Web Rankings for Universities: Syria, January 2026
license: Public ranking provider page; factual data only

rawFiles.name: Webometrics.org Syria ranking page
rawFiles.notes: Reviewed the public January 2026 Syria ranking table and imported only explicit rank values for clear canonical matches not already covered by an approved source.

transforms: Registered the independent Webometrics.org Syria page as an approved source for factual ranking snapshots only.
Kept this source separate from the Webometrics.info/Figshare source already registered as webometrics-ranking-web-january-2026.
Imported one global world-rank snapshot and one national Syria-rank snapshot for each clear missing canonical match.
Matched Institut Superieur des Sciences Appliquees et de Technologie Damascus to sy-higher-institute-of-applied-sciences-and-technology.
Matched Sham University to sy-al-sham-university and not sy-al-sham-private-university.
Matched Arab Academy for E-Business to sy-arab-academy-for-e-businesses.
reviewNotes: Imported six ranking snapshots covering three additional canonical universities. Other rows were left alone when already covered, outside the production boundary, or not clearly matched.
